title: Prakas #3413/MOC Amending and Supplementing the Issuance of Certificates of Origin, Commercial Invoices, and Export Licenses for Exported Garments _991029
title_en: Prakas #3413/MOC Amending and Supplementing the Issuance of Certificates of Origin, Commercial Invoices, and Export Licenses for Exported Garments _991029
short_name: Prakas #3413/MOC Amending and Supplementing the Issuance ...

provisions.title: The supplement to to Prakas No. 1437/MOC of May 25, 1999, regarding the issuance of
The paragraph “By Air” of Article 1 of Prakas No. 3195/MOC of October 13, 1999, regarding
provisions.content:
the issuance of certificates of origin, commercial invoices, and export licenses for garments shall be

modified and replaced as follows:

The issuance of licenses for the export of textile products:

The exportation to the European Union of categories 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 15, 21, 28, and 73 shall comply with

the following requirements:
• Cambodia Certificate of Origin “C/O” (one copy for the Foreign Trade Department).

provisions.title: At the end of each month, the Director of the of Generalized System of Preference
provisions.content:
Department, the d Director of the Foreign Trade Department, and the Director of Camcontrol shall

collect documents related to export for joint verification within their own responsibilities and
inspection, do research any factory that applied for a certificate of origin, commercial invoice, and

export license which failed to export such goods and to declare for cancellation of such export
documents and report to the Minister for instructions.

provisions.title: Any documents which are contrary to the provisions of this Prakas shall be abrogated.
provisions.content: Any documents which are contrary to the provisions of this Prakas shall be abrogated.

provisions.title: The Technical Director General, the Director General of Administration and Finance, the
provisions.content:
Director of generalized system of preference Department, the Director of Foreign trade department, and

the director of Camcontrol of the Ministry of Commerce shall perform their respective roles to
effectively enforce this Prakas.

provisions.title: This Prakas shall enter into force from the date of its signature.
provisions.content:
Phnom Penh, October 29, 1999

For Minister

Sok Siphana
